title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Ms Joanna Walker-Maxey
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions themselves. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.  Teacher’s name: Ms Joanna Walker-Maxey  Location teacher worked: North Shields, North East England  Date of professional conduct panel: 22 to 25 September 2025  Outcome type: No order made  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Ms Joanna Walker-Maxey, formerly employed in North Shields, North East England.   Teacher misconduct   Ground Floor, South Cheylesmore House 5 Quinton RoadCoventryCV1 2WT     Email TRA.Casework@education.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7593 5393    Information about regulating the teaching profession and the process for dealing with serious teacher misconduct.   "
